commit_message:
Fix use-after-free in mempool Fix use-after-free in mempool In `sim/common/simobject.h`, the `SimPortEvent` class uses `MemoryPool` to manage its instance allocation as the following code: 

https://github.com/vortexgpgpu/vortex/blob/2e7ab99d28d2164682709d8754bfe26bc3dfae95/sim/common/simobject.h#L211-L226

However, the allocator instance is a static local variable, it may destruct before some instances of `SimPortEvent`. If it happens, the following deletion calls `allocator().deallocate(pt
